heading: Config History
subtitle: Versioned snapshots of providers, models, routes, and plugins. Roll back the live config to a prior version.

table.empty: No snapshots yet. A snapshot is saved after the first config mutation.

confirm.title: Roll back config
confirm.body: Roll back the live config to version {version}?
confirm.warning: This replaces all current providers, models, routes, and plugins. The rollback itself produces a new snapshot version, so it is reversible from this page.
